title: SqueeZee Goo Marble Ball (One Supplied)
description: Product description Kids will love squishing and stretching these Squeezee Goo Pastel Squish Ball. This sensory squishy ball will keep fidgety hands occupied for hours with its gooey squishiness & marble colour design. Kids will love watching it squash out when they squeeze, returning to its original shape & colour as they let go. One colour will be sent at random. Safety Warning Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years
